sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48394" key="qerapousi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερᾰπ-ουσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θεραπεία</foreign> IV, condemned by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.75</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
